questions.prompt: Which document is the source of truth for monthly agent counts billed?
choices: The Huntress portal's current agent count
The Billing Detail Report emailed to the configured Billing Emails
questions.explanation: The Billing Detail Report is the per-Organization breakdown that matches what was billed. The portal shows current state, which can drift slightly from the billed snapshot.

questions.prompt: Decommissioned endpoints stop being billed automatically when they go offline for 45 days.
questions.explanation: Endpoints become Unresponsive after 45 days but they are still billed. Remote-uninstalling them via the portal is the action that removes them from billing. Bulk-uninstall of Unresponsive agents is the documented hygiene step.
